speaker: speaker1
text: I really need to start eating healthier .

speaker: speaker2
text: I have to start eating better too .

speaker: speaker1
text: What kind of food do you usually eat ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I try my best to eat only fruits , vegetables , and chicken .

speaker: speaker1
text: Is that really all that you eat ?

speaker: speaker1
text: How do you stick to only those foods ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Actually , fruits and veggies are really good for you .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yeah , I know , but what about the chicken ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I mainly eat baked chicken , because there's not a lot of fat .

speaker: speaker2
text: I know it does , and that's because it is .
